security.trustNote: Every action creates a cryptographic trust relationship
security.verificationDesc: The safety number for {{name}} has changed. This could be due to a reinstallation or a potential man-in-the-middle attack. Verify the fingerprint below.
security.notifPrivacyDesc: Manage how your data is displayed in system-level alerts.
security.encryptionAuditDesc: Asymmetric-key Agreement with continuous session-key renewal. Providing Forward Secrecy and Post-Compromise Security.

lock.title: Hades Locked
lock.subtitle:
Your messages are end-to-end encrypted.
No one can read them except you.

actionSheet.addContactDesc: Via key, QR, or secure link

settings.title: HADES
settings.privacyCodeDesc: Your data remains encrypted on your device. No content is sent to our servers. All metadata is stripped or set to null.
settings.sectionPrivacyDesc: Let others know when you've seen their messages.
settings.readReceiptsHint: Let others know when you've seen their messages
settings.typingIndicatorsHint: Show when you're composing a message
settings.anonymityRoutingHint: Hide your IP address by routing traffic through independent layers of volunteer-run nodes.
settings.deleteAccountHint: Remove your identity from the network
settings.incognitoKeyboardHint: Prevent keyboard from learning secure words
settings.clipboardTimerHint: Auto-wipe copied keys and IDs after delay

recovery.title: RECOVERY PHRASE
recovery.warningText: Store this phrase offline securely. If you lose your device, this is the only way to recover your vault. Hades staff cannot recover it for you.
recovery.quizDesc: To ensure you have written down the phrase correctly, please provide the words for the following positions.
recovery.quizFailed: One or more words are incorrect. Please try again.
recovery.confirmedDesc: Your recovery phrase has been verified. Keep your physical copy secure.

onboarding.heading: Generating your
onboarding.desc: Your keys are being generated locally on this device. No data ever leaves your possession unencrypted.
onboarding.featureE2EEDesc: Every message is locked with a unique key. Only the intended recipient has the hardware-bound key to open it. No one can read your data, even under legal compulsion.
onboarding.featureMetadataDesc: We don't track who you talk to, when you talk, or how often. The server routes messages blindly — your social graph stays invisible.
onboarding.featureNoPhoneDesc: Registration requires no SIM card or personal identifier. Your identity is a cryptographic key pair — not a tracking vector.
onboarding.featureOnionDesc: Mask your IP address by routing traffic through 3 independent layers of volunteer-run nodes. Perfect for high-risk environments.
onboarding.entropyPrompt: Move your finger across the screen to seed device entropy.

addContact.title: ADD CONTACT
addContact.scanHint: Center the Hades QR code within the frame
addContact.keyHint: A valid key is a 44-character Base64 string
